conditions.notes: Also demonstrated separation of PMMA according to stereoregularity (isotactic vs syndiotactic) under these conditions.
conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C... with C18 bonded silica gel.
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in a single component eluent (acetonitrile) on C18 bonded silica

conditions.notes: Temperature is far above the tabulated Theta point; system may exhibit two Theta points.
conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions have been identified... dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C... with C18 bonded silica gel.
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in a single component eluent (dimethylformamide) on C18 bonded silica

conditions.notes: Described as 'criticallike' elution; higher molar masses underwent phase separation but still eluted under critical conditions.
conditions.evidence_text: A 'criticallike' elution was also observed in cyclohexane for PS at 9 °C with silica gel C18 packing, which is well below the Θ temperature.
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in a single component eluent (cyclohexane) on C18 bonded silica
